meaning: adj.青春期的,青春期发生的
examples: Objective To investigate the methods of diagnosis and treatment of pediatric and hebetic adrenocorticotropic hormone (ACTH) secreting pituitary microadenoma.
Conclusion BIPSS is helpful in the diagnosis and localization of pediatric and hebetic ACTH pituitary microadenoma, and transsphenoidal surgery is the optimal choice of treatment.
